JUDGE R.KENT GRUNEWALD, DPADILLA, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK JURY TRIAL CONT'D, ALL PARTIES, BOTH COUNSEL & JURORS PRESENT. WITNESSES SWORN & EXAMINED. EXHIBITS INTRODUCED & ADMITTED IN EVIDENCE. TRIAL CONT'D TO 7/31/96 FOR FURTHER TRIAL AT 9AM.
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, ON PLTF COUNSEL'S MOT, CRT DECLARED A MISTRIAL AFTER VERDICT

JUDGE R. KENT GRUNEWALD, DPADILLA, REPORTER, GGOROSIN, CLERK JURY TRIAL CONT'D. ALL PARTIES, BOTH COUNSEL AND ALL JURORS PRESENT. CLOSING ARGUMENTS BY BOTH COUNSEL. COURT INSTRUCTS JURY. BAILIFF SWORN TO TAKE CHARGE OF THE JURY, JURY RETIRED TO DELIBERATE ON ITS VERDICT. JURY RETURNED WITH A VERDICT FOR THE DEFT AND AGAINST PLTF. VERDICT READ AND JURY POLLED AT THE REQUEST OF PLTF'S COUNSEL. VERDICT WAS 4 YES AND 4 NO INDICATING THAT THERE WAS NO VERDICT; COURT SENT THE JURY BACK FOR MORE DELIBERATION. JURY CAME BACK WITH A VERDICT FOR THE DEFT & AGAINST PLTF, JURY AGAIN POLLED AT PLTF'S REQUEST, VERDICT WAS 6 YES AND 2 NO IN FAVOR OF DEFT. VERDICT READ & FILED. JURY DISCHARGED, THANKED AND EXCUSED, EXHIBITS W/DRAWN TO PARTIES. PLTF MOVED FOR A MISTRIAL FOR REASON STATED ON THE RECORD, MOTION GRANTED, SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET 8/22/96 IN DEPT 1 AT 2PM AND JURY TRIAL TENTATIVELY SCHEDULED FOR 9/10/96 IN DEPT 1 AT 9AM PENDING CONFIRMATION BY PLTF'S COUNSEL WHO WILL CALL THE CLERK.
